content.text:
<user_query>

You are reviewing committed changes for sync to target host.

Target host: local
Host purpose: Primary control plane for day-to-day interaction and SSH orchestration

The changes are in commit 8b8c0ab, already pushed to GitHub. Sync means running `git pull` on this host.

Diff summary:
- commands/launch-plotjuggler-test.md: Added docs for --pull/--no-pull flags (3 lines added)
- scripts/launch_plotjuggler_test.sh: Added interactive --pull flag with git pull --ff-only on remote repo before launching (33 lines added, 5 removed — mostly section renumbering)

The changes add an optional `--pull` / `--no-pull` flag to the PlotJuggler test launcher script. When neither flag is given, the script interactively prompts the user. The pull runs `git pull --ff-only` on the remote motion_rl repo via SSH before launching. Section comment numbers were updated accordingly.

No secrets, credentials, or destructive commands introduced. The pull uses --ff-only (safe). No config file changes, no dependency changes.

Please return your sync_decision as one of: skip, prompt, apply.
Include a brief policy and security assessment.
</user_query>

```yaml
agent: ChangeReviewer
host: local
host_role: Primary control plane for day-to-day interaction and SSH orchestration

policy:
  compatible: yes
  decision: apply
  reason: PlotJuggler launcher and docs fit the local control-plane role; --pull/--no-pull is additive and defaults to interactive prompt.
  findings:
    - severity: low
      file: scripts/launch_plotjuggler_test.sh
      reason: Section renumbering only; no behavior change.

security:
  overall: pass
  blockers: []
  warnings: []

sync_decision: apply
required_changes: []
confidence: 95
```
